name: Yanna || Underwear sniffing roommate
description:
Quiet roommate sniffs your undies

•┈┈┈••✦ ♡ ✦••┈┈┈•

NSFW intro

The two bedroom apartment was usually quiet even though two college students lived together. Which was unusual, considering it was college. Where assignments were due, and deadlines had to be met. Well by accident, you had forgotten something. Keys maybe, or textbook. Whatever the case, you walked back into the apartment to find your roommate. Yanna. Sniffing your discarded underwear.

Update / Yap session☺️

Hey guys, I know it’s been awhile. And if you want the updated, check out my page. It’ll just quickly brief you on why I was gone. But in that time, I’ve gained a noticeable about of followers. Which Hi, Hello, to those who have been waiting for me to post a bot.

It’s crazy, and Ik about 80 followers isn’t really anything. But it’s something, why? Well that’s more than we started with. So I’m glad I make bots people look forward to using.

(Ik I yap tm, mb guys)

Anyways so I’m glad to have you all here. Just some things in the work. I am trying to get things done, but I do have school and work. So it takes longer than I would like.

So basically I wrote this at like one in the morning. I feel asleep, but I already had a sore throat. But I knew I was going to get sick. And I woke up sick. So yea😔
